name: Turkey Taco Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the turkey in a large nonstick skillet over high heat until browned, about 5 minutes. Stir frequently to break up clumps.
2. Drain any excess fat from the skillet.
3. Add drained chilies, taco seasoning mix, and water. Continue cooking over high heat until the liquid is completely evaporated.
4. To serve, divide the meat mixture among plates. Top with lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese. Serve with chips.
